description: Small dumplings most commonly made from potato, flour, and sometimes egg. They are boiled and then often finished in sauce or lightly pan-seared.
preparation_steps: Cook and mash potatoes or prepare another dough base.
Mix with flour and other ingredients just until a soft dough forms.
Shape into small dumplings and score if desired.
Serve with sauce or sauté briefly after boiling for extra texture.

nutrition.fat: Low to moderate, depending on sauce

health_advice.benefits: Can be part of a balanced meal when paired with vegetable-based sauces and moderate portions.
health_advice.risks: Heavy cream or cheese sauces can greatly increase calories and saturated fat.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Pair with tomato sauce, vegetables, or a lighter olive-oil-based sauce.

dietary_notes.note: Many traditional versions are vegetarian. Vegan versions are possible if egg is omitted. Gluten-free versions need gluten-free flour.

allergens: Milk if served with dairy-based sauce
